categories.name: General Admission
includes: Access to general concourse food courts

categories.name: Premium Seating
categories.description: Lower bowl seating with enhanced views

categories.name: VIP Experience
categories.description: Club level with all-inclusive food and beverage

policies.re_entry: Re-entry is NOT permitted once you exit the stadium. Please plan accordingly.
policies.transfer: Tickets are digital and can be transferred via the official FIFA app only. No third-party resale is verified by the stadium.
policies.lost_ticket: If you lose your digital ticket, visit the Box Office near Gate A with a valid photo ID. They can look up your purchase and reissue.
policies.child_policy: Children under 3 do not need a ticket if seated on a parent's lap. Children 3 and above require a full ticket.
policies.age_verification: Valid photo ID may be required at entry for age-restricted areas (VIP lounges, alcohol service).
policies.refund_policy: Tickets are non-refundable except in case of match cancellation. In case of cancellation, refunds are processed within 30 business days.

tips: Download your tickets to your phone before arriving — cell service may be limited near the stadium.
Take a screenshot of your ticket QR code as backup.
Arrive at least 90 minutes before kickoff to clear security and find your seat.
Check the official FIFA app for real-time gate wait times.
